title: adinauclea fagifolia
intro: Adinauclea fagifolia, also known as the Chinese alstonia or alstonia scholaris, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, Adinauclea fagifolia is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
